sections.title: Company Vehicle Policies and Procedures Acknowledgement
sections.subtitle: Driver information

sections.title: Acknowledgement
sections.html: I acknowledge that I have received, read, and understand the Company Vehicle Policies and Procedures of MH Construction, Inc. as described in the Employee Handbook. I understand that company vehicles are provided for company business only and agree to operate any assigned vehicle safely, lawfully, and in accordance with all company policies. I understand that I must hold a valid, unrestricted driver's license, that my Motor Vehicle Record (MVR) may be reviewed periodically, and that I must notify my manager immediately if my license is revoked, suspended, or restricted. I agree to keep any assigned vehicle clean, maintained, and secured, and to return all company property upon separation of employment.
